title: Potential Secret Exposure
description: A hardcoded secret or API key was detected in the source code.
suggestion: Move secrets to environment variables or a secure vault.

description: A hardcoded secret or API key was detected in the source code.

title: Debug Print Detected
description: Explicit print statements are often used for debugging and should be removed or replaced with logging.
suggestion: Use a logging library (e.g., 'logging' or 'loguru') instead of print().

title: OS Command Injection
description: The vulnerable_function is vulnerable to OS command injection attacks. An attacker could inject malicious commands by providing specially crafted user input.
suggestion: Use the subprocess module with a list of arguments instead of string concatenation, and validate user input to prevent injection attacks.

title: Secret Leak
description: The leaky_function contains a hardcoded API key, which could be exposed to unauthorized parties.
suggestion: Store sensitive information like API keys securely using environment variables or a secrets management system, and avoid hardcoding them in code.

title: Potential IndexError
description: The bug_function does not check if the items list has at least 11 elements before accessing the 11th element, which could result in an IndexError.
suggestion: Add a check to ensure the list has enough elements before accessing the desired index, or use a try-except block to handle the IndexError.
